title: Leaf Node
text: Home * Search * Node * Leaf Node M. C. Escher , Dewdrop, 1948 [1] Leaf nodes are nodes with no further successors. They are either terminal nodes or nodes where the desired depth from the root is accomplished and which has been assigned a heuristic value as an "educated guess" to an approximate of a terminal value. Each search tree has at least one leaf node. See also [ edit ] Horizon Node Interior Node Leaves of Node Types Quiescent Node Terminal Node External Links [ edit ] Leaf node from Wikipedia Klaus Schulze - The Wisdom of the Leaves, Contemporary Works II (2002), YouTube Video References [ edit ] ↑ M.
